mapper.insert: insert into product(images, price, title, description, create_time, update_time, is_deleted) VALUES (#{product.images}, #{product.price}, #{product.title}, #{product.description}, #{product.createTime}, #{product.updateTime}, #{product.isDeleted})
mapper.update: update product set images = #{product.images}, price = #{product.price}, title = #{product.title}, description=#{product.description}, update_time = #{product.updateTime} where id = #{product.id}
mapper.select: select id, images, title, price, description, create_time, update_time, is_deleted from product where id = #{id} and is_deleted = 0
